table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Nombre minimum et maximum de fois que l'élément peut apparaître dans l'instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Espace de noms (namespace) XML: urn:hl7-org:v3
Base for all types and resources
Les instances de ce type sont validées par templateId
Conteneur logique: ClinicalDocument (CDA Class)

tr.td: Conformité Encounter activity (CCD) Si rencontre réalisée (moodCode='EVN')

tr.td:
Type de rencontre
Valeur généralement issue du JDV_HL7_ActEncounterCode_CISIS (2.16.840.1.113883.1.11.13955) mais un autre JDV peut être utilisé pour certains documents spécifiques (dans ce cas, le JDV est fourni dans le volet concerné).

td.span: Allows for mixed text content. If @representation='B64', this SHALL be a base64binary string.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Date de la rencontre Si la rencontre est réalisée (EVN) ou planifiée (PMRS) : la date est obligatoire. Si la rencontre est prévue non confirmée (ARQ) : la date est facultative.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Confirmation attendue
Si la rencontre est prévue non confirmée (ARQ) et qu'une confirmation est attendue :
  • code='CS'
  • displayName='Recontacter pour fixer RDV'
  • codeSystem='2.16.840.1.113883.5.7'
  • codeSystemName='ActPriority'
Sinon,
  • l'élément <priorityCode> n'est pas fourni.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck0010.png)

publisher.value: Agence du Numérique en Santé (ANS) - 2-10 Rue d'Oradour-sur-Glane, 75015 Paris

name.value: Agence du Numérique en Santé (ANS) - 2-10 Rue d'Oradour-sur-Glane, 75015 Paris

description.value:
Entrée FR-Rencontre:

IHE-PCC - Encounter

L'entrée 'Rencontre' est un élément de type 'encounter' permettant de conserver les modalités d'une rencontre du patient. Il peut s'agir d'une rencontre passée ou à venir.

short.value: Base for all types and resources

definition.value: Defines the basic properties of every data value. This is an abstract type, meaning that no value can be just a data value without belonging to any concrete type. Every concrete type is a specialization of this general abstract DataValue type.
If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing.
When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question

When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question.

human.value: An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor.

definition.value: If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing.

A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form.
Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false).
Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model
A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root.
When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question

short.value: Conformité Encounter (IHE PCC)

definition.value: When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question
If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing.

A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form.
Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false).
A unique identifier that guarantees the global uniqueness of the instance identifier. The root alone may be the entire instance identifier.
A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root.

short.value: Conformité Encounter activity (CCD) Si rencontre réalisée (moodCode='EVN')

definition.value: When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question
If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing.

A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form.
Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false).
A unique identifier that guarantees the global uniqueness of the instance identifier. The root alone may be the entire instance identifier.
A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root.

short.value: Conformité Plan of care activity (CCD) Si rencontre planifiée (moodCode='PMRS') ou prévue non confirmée (moodCode='ARQ')

definition.value: When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question
If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing.

A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form.
Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false).
A unique identifier that guarantees the global uniqueness of the instance identifier. The root alone may be the entire instance identifier.
A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root.

short.value: Conformité FR-Rencontre (CI-SIS)

definition.value: When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question
If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing.

A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form.
Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false).
A unique identifier that guarantees the global uniqueness of the instance identifier. The root alone may be the entire instance identifier.
A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root.

short.value:
Type de rencontre
Valeur généralement issue du JDV_HL7_ActEncounterCode_CISIS (2.16.840.1.113883.1.11.13955) mais un autre JDV peut être utilisé pour certains documents spécifiques (dans ce cas, le JDV est fourni dans le volet concerné).

definition.value: If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing.
Indicates whether the raw byte data is compressed, and what compression algorithm was used.

The integrity check is a short binary value representing a cryptographically strong checksum that is calculated over the binary data. The purpose of this property, when communicated with a reference is for anyone to validate later whether the reference still resolved to the same data that the reference resolved to when the encapsulated data value with reference was created.

Specifies the algorithm used to compute the integrityCheck value. The cryptographically strong checksum algorithm Secure Hash Algorithm-1 (SHA-1) is currently the industry standard. It has superseded the MD5 algorithm only a couple of years ago, when certain flaws in the security of MD5 were discovered. Currently the SHA-1 hash algorithm is the default choice for the integrity check algorithm. Note that SHA-256 is also entering widespread usage.
For character based information the language property specifies the human language of the text.
Identifies the type of the encapsulated data and identifies a method to interpret or render the data.

short.value: Allows for mixed text content. If @representation='B64', this SHALL be a base64binary string.

definition.value: Data that is primarily intended for human interpretation or for further machine processing is outside the scope of HL7. This includes unformatted or formatted written language, multimedia data, or structured information as defined by a different standard (e.g., XML-signatures.)

comment.value: This element is represented in XML as textual content. The actual name "xmlText" will not appear in a CDA instance.

definition.value: A telecommunication address (TEL), such as a URL for HTTP or FTP, which will resolve to precisely the same binary data that could as well have been provided as inline data.

An abbreviated rendition of the full data. A thumbnail requires significantly fewer resources than the full data, while still maintaining some distinctive similarity with the full data. A thumbnail is typically used with by-reference encapsulated data. It allows a user to select data more efficiently before actually downloading through the reference.

short.value: Date de la rencontre Si la rencontre est réalisée (EVN) ou planifiée (PMRS) : la date est obligatoire. Si la rencontre est prévue non confirmée (ARQ) : la date est facultative.

Confirmation attendue
Si la rencontre est prévue non confirmée (ARQ) et qu'une confirmation est attendue :
  • code='CS'
  • displayName='Recontacter pour fixer RDV'
  • codeSystem='2.16.840.1.113883.5.7'
  • codeSystemName='ActPriority'
Sinon,
  • l'élément <priorityCode> n'est pas fourni.
Lieu d'exécution

definition.value: If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing.
When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question

When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question.

human.value: An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor.

definition.value: If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing.

A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form.
Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false).
Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model
A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root.
When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question
If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing.
When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question

When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question.

human.value: An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor.

definition.value: If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing.

A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form.
Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false).
Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model
A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root.
When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question

short.value: Identifiant de l'établissement
Coordonnées télécom
Conformité Encounter (IHE PCC)
Conformité Encounter activity (CCD) Si rencontre réalisée (moodCode='EVN')
Conformité Plan of care activity (CCD) Si rencontre planifiée (moodCode='PMRS') ou prévue non confirmée (moodCode='ARQ')
Conformité FR-Rencontre (CI-SIS)

Type de rencontre
Valeur généralement issue du JDV_HL7_ActEncounterCode_CISIS (2.16.840.1.113883.1.11.13955) mais un autre JDV peut être utilisé pour certains documents spécifiques (dans ce cas, le JDV est fourni dans le volet concerné).
Date de la rencontre Si la rencontre est réalisée (EVN) ou planifiée (PMRS) : la date est obligatoire. Si la rencontre est prévue non confirmée (ARQ) : la date est facultative.

Confirmation attendue
Si la rencontre est prévue non confirmée (ARQ) et qu'une confirmation est attendue :
  • code='CS'
  • displayName='Recontacter pour fixer RDV'
  • codeSystem='2.16.840.1.113883.5.7'
  • codeSystemName='ActPriority'
Sinon,
  • l'élément <priorityCode> n'est pas fourni.
Lieu d'exécution
Identifiant de l'établissement
Coordonnées télécom
